name: Ideas
description: Inspiration-led article with a broad set of attractive, usable directions.
intent_description: The reader is exploring possibilities, aesthetics, and styling directions before narrowing down a choice.

name: How-To
description: Instructional or decision-making article with practical steps.
intent_description: The reader wants a practical path they can follow to apply the look or solve the task.

name: Mistakes
description: Problem-prevention article that helps the reader avoid common styling errors.
intent_description: The reader is trying to diagnose what is going wrong and correct it with clearer decisions.

name: Best Options
description: Recommendation-led article focused on strong options, choices, and decision criteria.
intent_description: The reader is weighing alternatives and wants tradeoffs, criteria, and best-fit recommendations.

name: Budget
description: Constraint-based article that keeps cost, simplicity, or accessibility in view.
intent_description: The reader needs help making a constrained decision based on budget, priorities, or tradeoffs.

name: Small-Space
description: Article adapted to compact layouts, apartments, or narrow footprints.
intent_description: The reader needs to choose the best-fit approach for a specific constraint such as size, layout, or footprint.

name: Style-Specific
description: Article framed through a distinct decor style or visual direction.
intent_description: The reader wants a clearer visual language, aesthetic reference point, or style-led direction.
